title: Hedbanz 2nd Edition Picture Guessing Board Game Family Games & Kids’ Games for Kids Aged 6 and up
features: ALL NEW GAME: It’s the 2nd edition of the quick question “What am I?” game. Includes 6 new bands — Dino, Narwhal, Robot, Flower, Butterfly and Brain PLUS new illustrations such as a snake and sunglasses
SIMPLE TO PLAY: Pick a headband, place a card in it and play to figure out what’s shown on your card. Using yes/no questions, be the first to guess 3 cards correctly and you win

FAMILY GAME NIGHT: Hedbanz is a must-have in your collection of family games for kids and adults. It is for everyone aged 6 and up. For 2–6 players, bring it along when you are in need of fun board games for family night
SPIN MASTER PUZZLES, TOYS AND GAMES: A world of jigsaw puzzles and family board games for kids, teens and adults. Plus strategy, cards and classic board games like dominoes, mahjong or chess
Includes 6 Headbands, 6 Headplates, 16 Scoring Badges, 1 Timer, 69 Picture Cards, 3 Sample Question Cards, Instructions
ENTERTAINMENT FOR EVERYONE: When you are with friends, bring a Spin Master game, toy or cards. For family game nights, birthday gifts, party games, travel and whenever you just want to have fun
